chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1144 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 7646/2024 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 5247/2024 4. For hearing of main case 29.10.2024 Mr. Mazhar Ali Laghari Advocate for Petitioner. ----- 1. Granted. 2to4. Petitioner is Primary School Teacher who has been posted to some other School and this Petition is filed for implementation of the said Order. The Petitioner being a Civil Servant cannot challenge his transfer or posting in this Petition in view of the bar contained under Article 212 of the Constitution, although Petitioner’s counsel attempted to differentiate his case. In view of the Supreme Court judgment in the case of ALI AZHAR KHAN BALOCH and others versus PROVINCE OF SINDH and others (2015 SCMR 456), such Petition is not maintainable. It is dismissed in limine along with pending Application. However, Petitioner can avail the remedy as per Service Rules. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
